parsed_profile.data_quality: low - primary source from chapter-level samples only

reader_promise: A cunning protagonist navigates dangerous cultivation territory through wit, preparation, and timely activation of dormant protective powers, gaining strength from near-death experiences while accumulating loyal animal companions and pursuing artifact acquisition quests in a Taoist-inflected world.

core_engine.secondary_mechanism: Dormant power activation at death's door delivering bonus cultivation benefits
core_engine.tertiary_mechanism: Creature taming through will-dominance combat resulting in loyal pet acquisition
core_engine.structural_pattern: Preparation-foreshadowing-execution with complications leading to climactic crisis resolution
core_engine.narrative_tone: Comedic relief through bumbling companion, animal rivalry dynamics, and tension-release banter

reader_rewards: Cultivation world immersion with technical mechanics exposition
Satisfying near-death crisis resolution with tangible strength gains
Humorous character dynamics through companion interactions
Creature taming spectacle with dominance-based power fantasy
Mischievous protagonist outsmarting dangers through preparation
reusable_mechanisms: Preparation-foreshadowing-execution pattern: traps/mechanisms explained before complication deployment
Dormant protective power activation at mortality threshold delivering cultivation bonus
Crisis-survival-reward pattern: near-death improves protagonist's abilities
Creature taming via direct will confrontation and dominance establishment
Dynamic duo pairing: cunning schemer with loyal bumbling companion
Group panic sequence: external observers fear death while protagonist undergoes internal transformation
Training exposition through teaching dialogue moments
Comedic tension release through animal reaction and banter
Artifact quest structure: discovery, identification, failed capture, pursuit
Animal companion rivalry through multiple creatures competing for protagonist attention
non_reusable_specifics: Named artifact creatures (venomous invertebrates as cultivation assets)
Named cultivation array formations and protective talismans
Named human companions and animal pets with individual designations
risk_patterns: {'pattern': 'Exposition_through_dialogue', 'frequency': 'high', 'mitigation': 'Integrate teaching moments with action sequences rather than standalone exposition blocks'}
{'pattern': 'Resurrection_mechanism_plot_armor', 'frequency': 'medium', 'mitigation': 'Limit dormant power activations; ensure proper narrative setup and increasingly dangerous thresholds'}
{'pattern': 'Companion_dilution', 'frequency': 'medium', 'mitigation': "Maintain focus on protagonist's cultivation journey; give animal companions distinct narrative functions"}
{'pattern': 'Artificial_cliffhanger', 'frequency': 'medium', 'mitigation': 'Ensure pursuit hooks have logical momentum; avoid pure danger-seeking without character motivation'}
{'pattern': 'Protagonist_intelligence_inconsistency', 'frequency': 'low', 'mitigation': 'Establish clear cost-benefit reasoning for defying warnings rather than pure recklessness'}
{'pattern': 'Chapter_level_parse_failure', 'frequency': 'documented', 'mitigation': 'Manual content review required for volumes 1-11; current card based solely on 2 valid chapter samples'}
